title: schefflera angkae
intro: Schefflera angkae is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, commonly known as the Angkae Schefflera or Angkae Tree. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Schefflera angkae is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, to support overall health and well-being.
